name: TERT 300kb inter-TAD region (ENCODE K562 CTCF + H3K27ac)
description: 300kb window spanning the TERT inter-TAD boundary region on chr5p15.33. TERT sits in a ~120kb gap between two K562 Arrowhead contact domains (Rao et al. 2014, GSE63525). The left TAD boundary ends at ~1,240,000, the right starts at ~1,360,000. A 470kb chromatin loop (HiCCUPS, anchors at ~1,170kb and ~1,640kb, 45 obs contacts, FDR=4.4e-6) encloses TERT. CTCF sites from ENCODE K562 ChIP-seq (ENCFF736NYC, ENCSR000DWE, IDR narrowPeak, GRCh38). H3K27ac from ENCODE K562 (ENCFF864OSZ, ENCSR000AKP). NOTE: No CTCF or H3K27ac peaks overlap TERT gene body — consistent with TERT being regulated via BCR-ABL/STAT5a in K562, not through local enhancers. TERT promoter hotspot mutations (C228T at 1,295,113, C250T at 1,295,135) create de novo ETS binding sites.

enhancers.name: TERT_TSS_promoter
enhancers.note: TERT transcription start site (NM_198253.3, minus strand, TSS at txEnd=1,295,068). K562 expresses TERT via BCR-ABL/STAT5a pathway. No H3K27ac peak at this position in ENCODE K562 data — regulation is trans-acting, not enhancer-driven. MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy=0.6 reflecting moderate transcriptional activity without local enhancer marks

enhancers.name: SLC6A19_promoter_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Two overlapping H3K27ac peaks at SLC6A19 promoter: 1,199,226-1,200,103 (signal=14.57) and 1,200,160-1,201,257 (signal=14.57). Combined ~2kb active promoter. Located ~94kb upstream of TERT TSS

enhancers.name: LOC124900189_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: H3K27ac peak at LOC124900189 region (1,185,092-1,186,739, 1.6kb, signal=10.56). Located ~109kb upstream of TERT TSS

enhancers.name: CLPTM1L_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Strongest H3K27ac peak in window: 1,345,202-1,346,105 (signal=16.44, -log10q=42.59). At CLPTM1L 3' end/intron. Part of the 5p15.33 TERT-CLPTM1L cancer susceptibility locus. Located ~50kb downstream of TERT TSS

enhancers.name: CLPTM1L_intron_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: H3K27ac peak in CLPTM1L intron (1,343,941-1,344,855, signal=11.99, -log10q=24.10)

ctcf_sites.name: TERLR1_CTCF_strongest
ctcf_sites.note: Strongest CTCF in window (1,174,481-1,174,709, signal=186.14). Near TERLR1/LOC124900189. Co-localizes with left anchor of 470kb chromatin loop (Rao 2014 HiCCUPS). Candidate left TAD boundary element

ctcf_sites.name: upstream_TERLR1_CTCF_1
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF upstream of TERLR1 (1,168,206-1,168,420, signal=169.36). Part of CTCF cluster at left TAD boundary

ctcf_sites.name: upstream_TERLR1_CTCF_2
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF upstream of TERLR1 (1,167,763-1,167,959, signal=131.55). Part of CTCF cluster at left TAD boundary

ctcf_sites.name: SLC6A19_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF in SLC6A19 gene body (1,209,000-1,209,169, signal=127.70)

ctcf_sites.name: TERLR1_SLC6A19_intergenic_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF between TERLR1 and SLC6A19 (1,204,846-1,204,914, signal=84.68)

ctcf_sites.name: SLC6A18_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF in SLC6A18 gene body (1,235,444-1,235,714, signal=58.64)

ctcf_sites.name: SLC6A18_3prime_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF near SLC6A18 3' end (1,245,071-1,245,341, signal=37.92). Nearest CTCF to TERT 5' end (~8kb upstream). Candidate intra-loop insulator

ctcf_sites.name: LINC01511_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF at LINC01511 3' end (1,380,397-1,380,667, signal=69.42). ~85kb downstream of TERT. Near right TAD boundary start (~1,360,000)

ctcf_sites.name: SLC6A3_CTCF_1
ctcf_sites.note: Weak CTCF in SLC6A3 gene body (1,408,590-1,408,860, signal=14.23)

ctcf_sites.name: SLC6A3_CTCF_2
ctcf_sites.note: Weak CTCF in SLC6A3 gene body (1,437,544-1,437,814, signal=15.98)

tad_boundaries.name: left_TAD_right_edge
tad_boundaries.note: Right edge of Domain A (hg19: 910,000-1,240,000, 330kb, f1=1.138). Contains SLC12A7, TERLR1, SLC6A19, SLC6A18. TERT is NOT within this domain. Rao et al. 2014 Cell (PMID:25497547). Offset hg19→hg38 negligible (<200bp at this locus)

tad_boundaries.name: right_TAD_left_edge
tad_boundaries.note: Left edge of Domain C (hg19: 1,360,000-1,660,000, 300kb, f1=1.306). Contains LINC01511, SLC6A3. TERT is in the 120kb INTER-TAD GAP between Domain A and Domain C

tad_domains.liftover_method: minimal offset (<200bp at this locus, negligible at TAD resolution)

studies.finding: BCR-ABL regulates hTERT at multiple levels in K562 via STAT5a pathway. Gleevec inhibits hTERT mRNA and telomerase activity

tert_promoter_hotspots._note: Two somatic hotspot mutations creating de novo ETS binding sites. Positions verified via dbSNP/ClinVar

C250T.mechanism: Creates identical de novo ETS binding motif as C228T

_thresholds_note: Not calibrated for 300x300 matrix. TERT sits in an inter-TAD boundary region with sparse CTCF/enhancer features — may show weaker structural discrimination than loci within well-defined TADs (e.g., HBB, TP53). Requires empirical recalibration.
